zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格维持在1587附近窄幅震荡，整体走势偏弱，价格持续运行在20日均线1595下方，短线反弹动能有限，多头缺乏延续性，市场情绪趋于谨慎观望。整体结构呈现弱势整理格局，尚未出现明确方向突破信号。短期均线压制明显。需等待波动放大。

技术指标方面，RSI数据缺失难以判断超买超卖，但MACD仍处轻微正值，动能柱趋弱，显示多空力量进入平衡阶段，短期缺乏趋势性驱动信号。市场成交动能不足，方向选择延后。波动率持续收敛。需关注后续放量情况确认突破方向变化。

下方支撑关注1580与1550区域，上方阻力位于1595及1620附近，若无法站稳均线之上，价格仍可能回踩支撑区间，短线结构偏震荡整理。若跌破支撑或将打开下行空间。反之需放量突破1595确认反弹，否则维持弱势震荡为主运行。

交易建议以区间操作为主，激进者可在支撑附近轻仓试多，阻力区域逐步止盈，若跌破1550需及时止损离场，等待新一轮趋势确认。整体仓位控制为关键，避免追涨杀跌。关注MACD变化与均线压制，等待有效突破再加仓操作纪律。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against USD is exhibiting a tight consolidation phase with extremely compressed intraday movement. Price action remains pinned just below short-term equilibrium, suggesting indecision between buyers and sellers. Despite the lack of volatility, the structure leans slightly bearish as price trades under the 20-period simple moving average. Broader momentum appears neutral, with no decisive breakout confirming a trend continuation in either direction currently developing.

The MACD reading at 2.68964 suggests a mild bullish momentum component still exists, although confirmation is limited due to the absence of a signal line. Price trading below the SMA 20 at 1595.64750 reinforces short-term weakness. Without RSI data, momentum gauging remains incomplete, requiring caution. Overall, indicators reflect a transitional phase where bullish impulses struggle against overhead technical resistance pressure while volatility contraction suggests imminent directional expansion.

Immediate support sits near current lows around 1587, with a deeper cushion forming at 1580 and 1572 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, initial resistance appears at 1590, followed closely by the SMA20 near 1595, which acts as a key pivot. A break above this zone could open momentum toward 1605 and potentially 1620, where prior supply zones may re-emerge.

Given the current low-volatility environment, range-bound strategies are preferable, focusing on buying near support and taking partial profits near resistance. Traders may consider long entries above confirmed rebounds from 1587 with tight risk controls below 1580. Alternatively, breakout confirmation above 1595 would signal renewed bullish momentum. Position sizing should remain conservative until volatility expands and trend direction becomes clearer to avoid whipsaw risk.
